response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential sources of false information and take steps to verify the accuracy of what you see. This can include fact-checking websites, cross-referencing information with other sources, and using social media platforms' built-in fact-checking tools. Additionally, being mindful of your own biases and the ways in which they may influence your perception of reality can also help you to be more discerning in what you share and consume on social media. By taking these steps, you can help to promote a more informed and critical approach to using social media, and reduce the spread of misinformation.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential sources of false information and take steps to verify the accuracy of what you see. This can include fact-checking websites, cross-referencing information with other sources, and using social media platforms' built-in fact-checking tools. Additionally, being mindful of your own biases and the ways in which they may influence your perception of reality can also help you to be more discerning in what you share and consume on social media. By taking these steps, you can help to promote a more informed and critical approach to using social media, and reduce the spread of misinformation.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of potential sources of false information, verify the accuracy of what you see through fact-checking websites and cross-referencing with other sources, use social media platforms' built-in fact-checking tools, and be mindful of your own biases. By taking these steps, you can help promote a more informed and critical approach to using social media and reduce the spread of misinformation.
